Meaning.En: A connection or association between people, groups, or things.
Meaning.Example: She explored the relation between diet and heart disease.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả mối liên kết giữa các cá nhân, tổ chức, hoặc khái niệm.
Situation.En: Describing how individuals, organizations, or concepts are connected.

Meaning.Vi: Mối quan hệ tình cảm (thường dùng trong số ít)
Meaning.En: A romantic or sexual relationship, especially one that is not publicly acknowledged.
Meaning.Example: There were rumors of a relation between the two executives.

Situation.Vi: Dùng để nói về mối quan hệ yêu đương, thường mang tính riêng tư hoặc bí mật.
Situation.En: Used to refer to a romantic or intimate relationship, often private or discreet.
